content:
✨ oracle-ai-developer-hub | Jupyter Notebook
🎯 Primary Use Case: To serve as a technical hub and showcase for developers building AI applications and agents using Oracle's AI Database and OCI services.
✨ Key Features: • Reference implementations for AI applications and agents • Integration with Oracle AI Database and OCI services • Demonstrates architectural patterns and best practices
📖 Summary: This repository provides technical resources and reference implementations for developers to build AI applications, agents, and systems. It focuses on leveraging Oracle AI Database and OCI services, integrating them with various AI/Agent stack components for end-to-end solutions.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
